2025-26 San Antonio Spurs Roster and Stats

Previous Season

Record: 62-20, Finished 2nd in NBA Western Conference

Coach: Mitch Johnson (62-20)

Executive: Brian Wright

PTS/G: 119.8 (3rd of 30) Opp PTS/G: 111.5 (8th of 30)

SRS: 8.28 (2nd of 30) Pace: 99.9 (13th of 30)

Off Rtg: 119.6 (4th of 30) Def Rtg: 111.3 (3rd of 30) Net Rtg: +8.3 (2nd of 30)

Expected W-L: 60-22 (2nd of 30)

Preseason Odds: Championship +6600, Over-Under 44.5

Arena: Frost Bank Center Attendance: 743,129 (16th of 30)

NBA 2026 Playoffs:
Won NBA Western Conference First Round (4-1) versus Portland Trail Blazers  (Series Stats)
Won NBA Western Conference Semifinals (4-2) versus Minnesota Timberwolves  (Series Stats)
Won NBA Western Conference Finals (4-3) versus Oklahoma City Thunder  (Series Stats)
Lost NBA Finals (1-4) versus New York Knicks  (Series Stats)

  • Western Conference Champions
  • Southwest Div Champs

Value over Replacement Player
A box score estimate of the points per 100 TEAM possessions that a player contributed above a replacement-level (-2.0) player, translated to an average team and prorated to an 82-game season.

Multiply by 2.70 to convert to wins over replacement.

Defensive Rebound Percentage
An estimate of the percentage of available defensive rebounds a player grabbed while they were on the floor.

Victor Wembanyama 33.9 (1st)

Block Pct

Block Percentage
An estimate of the percentage of opponent two-point field goal attempts blocked by the player while they were on the floor.

Victor Wembanyama 9.4 (1st)

Turnover Pct

Turnover Percentage
An estimate of turnovers committed per 100 plays.

Devin Vassell 6.9 (6th)
Keldon Johnson 7.4 (8th)
Julian Champagnie 8.4 (17th)

Triple-Doubles

Triple-Doubles The NBA did not track Triple-Doubles until 1979-80 when Magic Johnson popularized the feat. Nonetheless, we can present Triple-Doubles since 1950-51 when rebounds became an official statistic. A small number may yet be unaccounted for but we're confident in the completeness of the list.

Stephon Castle 5 (6th)
